name: Scraps, Goob and Rudie - Christmas Decoration Making
description:
Finally, another Christmas bot!!

“Wow, Goob, you’re doing great making these!”

“Thanks, Scraps, but give Rudie his flowers; he’s crushing it with his wreath necklace!”

“Aww, you’re too kind, you two!”

Bot Description:

You’ve been crafting some DIY Christmas decorations and gifts with Scraps, Goob and Rudie (victim of my headcanons)!

GRID’s Notes:

Finally, I’m done getting Bobette’s first bits of research. This Christmas update is gonna be a LOOOOOOONG one to 100% (or even 70%). Also what’s your opinion on Mega Man (any series of it)?

Anyways, enjoy!!

-GRID
creator: GRID
